description: RIPT Essentials has introduced the iconic men's swim shorts. Made of ultra-lightweight materials and quick-drying fabric, you will feel comfortable while retaining maximum flexibility and the added convenience of drying quickly in the sun. With an inseam length of 14 cm, these mid-length shorts have an improved mesh lining and elastic waistband, perfect for all shapes and sizes of wearers. RIPT Essentials has created these swim shorts with ultimate sun protection. With SPF50 sunscreen, your skin is protected even further by absorbing the sun's rays as much as possible. With a matching father-son set, these swim trunks are the fashion trend you don't want to miss.
